title: nolina brandegeei
intro: Nolina brandegeei, also known as Brandegee's beargrass or Brandegee's yucca, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Nolina. It is native to Baja California, Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nolina brandegeei include soothing skin irritations, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and salves.
